Olivia, in books by Ian Falconer

You could say a 1994 Tom Hanks character had this, courage & a strong sense of self
In 2022 Will Smith told this man to "Keep my wife's name out your... mouth"
Kim Cattrall said she's "never been friends" with the other stars of this show & we can't help wondering, can co-workers be pals?
In November 2024 Jake Paul won by decision over this man, who had postponed the fight when an ulcer flared up
Asked her opinion about J Lo, this "Queen of Christmas" diva left some coal in a stocking by saying, "I don't know her"
Charlize Theron & Tom Hardy weren't pals making this 2015 film; an editor said it was "clear that those 2 people hated each other"
With a sly grin, Jacques Mondieu entered the National Archives with one goal--like Nic Cage onscreen, to steal this document
M. Mondieu makes a reservation--for thievery!--eyeing safes in this hotel on Central Park South that boasts an "Eloise" suite
Even Jacques Mondieu thinks twice about stealing this c. 1455 book at the British Library; stealing is frowned upon in it
Just ahead of the Laotian authorities, Jacques crosses the eastern border into this nation & relaxes at a spa in Quy Nhon
Mondieu! Jacques somehow passed himself off as the grandson of this woman who abdicated Denmark's throne on Jan. 14, 2024

(Sterling K. Brown presents the clue.) In May 2007 news, Barack Obama, then holding this office, got Secret Service protection earlier than any candidate ever, attributed to the historic nature of his campaign

(Sterling K. Brown presents the clue.) Candidates get to okay their own code names & those given to their families start with the same letter; Donald Trump is Mogul & this couple, sometimes involved in policy, got Marvel & Mechanic

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Sterling K. Brown presents the clue.) Even when he was only a possible future candidate, President Nixon insisted on giving Secret Service protection to this man so the agents could report on any extramarital affairs

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Sterling K. Brown presents the clue.) Protectors fall in love, too, as in "The Bodyguard"; let's not forget "The Sentinel" with Michael Douglas & Kim Basinger; & in real life, this ex-president's daughter, Susan, married one of dad's Secret Service agents in 1979

(Sterling K. Brown presents the clue.) Edith Wilson was the first first lady to have her own agent; this woman was the third & scandal ensued when she & her protector, James Haley got lost on a hike in the Black Hills for several hours

final.clue: Name shared by a groundbreaking magazine launched in April 1926 & a TV anthology series that premiered in September 1985

These 2 rhyming "B" capitals, each with close to 2 million people, are located about 500 miles apart

Once home to the grandmasters of the Knights of St. John, the Grandmaster's Palace is a must-see in this city
Founded in 1909, this British government agency collects & analyzes foreign intelligence
This retirement savings program organized by employers can be either traditional or Roth
Alphanumeric MLB pitching stats include HR/9, BB/9 & this one, an amazing career 10.6 for Randy Johnson
Prediabetes can be detected with this test of blood glucose over a few months; a normal level is below 5.7%
A plaque in his Ind. birthplace says this Teamsters leader "forged a national trucking agreement, raising wages for over 400,000"

Born in Lafayette, he got to L.A., banded together to "Slash" open a can of Duff & sing "Welcome To The Jungle"
Known for his bow tie & glasses, he studied agronomy at Purdue & later sold popcorn kernels out of his car--that biz popped pretty big
These 2 men are the most recent U.S. vice presidents to hail from Indiana
A Mercury astronaut & the second American in space, this Indiana man tragically lost his life aboard Apollo 1
Master craftsman Bezaleel built this sacred object based on instructions given on Mount Sinai
Through his marriage to this woman, Boaz was the father of Obed, the grandfather of Jesse & the great-grandfather of David
This "B" boy among the 12 Apostles is called Nathanael in John's gospel & may have died in Armenia after preaching there
Though of advanced age, Barzillai of Gilead gave food & supplies to David when he was on the run during this son's rebellion
Ranging about 4 to 30 miles up, this atmospheric layer is relatively free of violent storms & also contains the ozone layer
An isohaline on an ocean map connects points with the same amount of this

This term refers to the weathering of boulders over time with flakes breaking away, leaving a spherical result--no loofah required
This 8-letter depth of the white stuff affects our water supply out West; 110% of normal in the Sierras in April 2024, woo-hoo!

"It takes two to break a heart in two", sings guest Morgan Wallen on this guy's 2024 smash "I Had Some Help"
